title: **REGIONOMICA CONSULTING**
text:
REGIONOMICA provides solutions in public management using spatial econometrics and productivity & efficiency analysis, with a focus is on regional and global dynamics
REGIONOMICA oferece soluções em gestão pública usando econometria espacial e análise de produtividade e eficiência, com foco em dinâmicas regionais e globais

title: Efficiency in Public Management
text: This is a placeholder for my first professional report.

title: Renaud B. Evina
text:
Professional Profile
I am a consultant and researcher with years of experience in the intersection of Law, Economics, and Policy.
My work focuses on applying advanced quantitative methods to problems in public policy & management at the regional and national levels.


Education
University of Brasília | Brasília, Brazil

MSc in Political Science | Mar 2018 - Dec 2020
Bachelor of Laws | 2011 - 2017
Bachelor in Economics | 2005 - 2010



Technical Expertise
I bridge the gap between theory and applied policy applying:

Spatial Econometrics
Stochastic Frontier Models (Benchmarking Analysis)
Discrete Choice Experiments

I use Software R & PostgreSQL/PostGIS
